plan_type_rationale: Bug fix in a single function with new unit + invariant tests + E2E verification. Multiple ordered tasks with halt gates between code change, test additions, and dynamic re-verification — fits phased pattern.
objective: Fix normalizeChunkFile() so absolute-Windows-path chunk.file values correctly map to relative-POSIX graph node.file keys, restoring AC-09 dynamic alignment (chunksSkipped == header_missing_count ±10% when header_missing>0).

phases.title: Reproduce + select fix shape
phases.gate: Reproduction shows chunksSkipped=0 vs expected ~262; implementer picks fix option (1, 2, or 3 from stub) and documents in execution-notes.md

tasks.what: node dist/src/cli/populate.js . to populate graph; then CODEREF_LLM_PROVIDER=ollama CODEREF_RAG_LOCAL_ONLY=1 node dist/src/cli/rag-index.js --dir . --reset to reproduce skip miss
execution-notes.md — record reproduction output + selected fix shape (option 1 / 2 / 3 + rationale)
Halt gate: implementer + reviewer agree on fix shape before any src/ change

phases.title: Implement fix
phases.gate: src/integration/rag/indexing-orchestrator.ts diff localized to normalizeChunkFile body; tsc --noEmit clean both configs

tasks.what: src/integration/rag/indexing-orchestrator.ts — modify normalizeChunkFile() per selected shape (peel file: prefix, or path.relative, or dual-key). Keep diff to ~10-20 LOC.
tsc --noEmit on both tsconfig configs — expect clean
fix(rag): normalize chunk.file URI/absolute paths to graph.json relative-POSIX keys

phases.title: Add unit test
phases.gate: New test fixture covers all 4 shape combos (abs-Win, abs-POSIX, file:abs-Win, file:abs-POSIX); 4/4 PASS

tasks.what: __tests__/integration/rag/indexing-orchestrator-path-normalization.test.ts — fixture with 4 chunk-file shapes + relative-POSIX graph keys, asserts join succeeds for all 4
test(rag): unit fixture for normalizeChunkFile across 4 path shapes

phases.title: Extend invariant test
phases.gate: indexing-gate-invariant.test.ts asserts chunksSkipped >= header_missing_count - tolerance whenever header_missing>0; full suite GREEN

tasks.what: __tests__/pipeline/indexing-gate-invariant.test.ts — add invariant: when header_missing_count>0 AND IndexingResult.status != 'failed', assert chunksSkipped(header_status_missing) >= header_missing_count - tolerance
vitest run __tests__/pipeline/indexing-gate-invariant.test.ts — expect existing 6 + 1 new = 7/7 PASS

phases.title: Dynamic re-verification + close
phases.gate: E2E smoke shows status='partial', chunksSkipped within ±10% of header_missing_count=262; ground-truth 6/6 PASS; no-phase-8-docs-leak 6/6 PASS; tsc clean

tasks.what: Re-run E2E smoke on coderef-core's own source (Ollama up). Confirm: status='partial', chunksIndexed=1, chunksSkipped~262 (±10%)
Full vitest pipeline+rag suite — confirm no regressions; ground-truth 6/6 PASS
execution-notes.md — closeout report: dynamic chunksSkipped count, % alignment vs 262, AC-01..AC-06 status table
git push origin main — push all 5 atomic commits

acceptance_criteria.statement: normalizeChunkFile correctly maps absolute-Windows-path chunk.file to relative-POSIX graph node.file
chunksSkipped count matches header_missing_count ±10% on dynamic E2E run
No schema additions to IndexingResult; no new SkipReason values; existing header_status_missing fires correctly

hard_constraints: Phase 7 archive must NOT be reopened (rebuild is COMPLETE)
No new field on IndexingResult schema (DR-PHASE-7-B locked)
No new SkipReason values (existing header_status_missing is correct)
Diff confined to normalizeChunkFile() + tests + closeout docs
halt_and_report_conditions: If fix-shape selection requires touching IndexingResult schema → HALT, ORCHESTRATOR ruling required
If invariant test reveals header_missing_count==0 in fixture (degenerate) → HALT, fixture must use real graph.json with non-zero header_missing
If tsc breaks in either config → HALT before commit
